name: The Early Departure
effect: Declare the day concluded at an arbitrary point. This card is considered decisive.

clauses.name: DEPARTURE CLAUSE
clauses.rule: When a minor inconvenience is encountered: The remainder of the day is cancelled.

clauses.name: VISIBILITY OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: For the remainder of the week: This card is considered off-grid and cannot be actioned.

clauses.name: REAPPEARANCE EFFECT
clauses.rule: On Monday morning: This card returns fully refreshed and unaware of outstanding items.

witness_quote: Has anyone heard from them since Tuesday?

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Was anyone waiting on a decision?
